bird.name: Meyer's parrot
bird.summary: Meyer's parrot (Poicephalus meyeri), also known as the brown parrot, is a species of parrot native to Africa. A Meyer's parrot has black fe…

locations.name: 奥卡万戈三角洲
locations.summary: 奥卡万戈三角洲（Okavango Delta，或譯奥卡凡哥），亦称“奥卡万戈沼泽”，位于博茨瓦纳北部，面积约15,000平方公里（5,800平方英里），是世界上最大的内陆三角洲，由奥卡万戈河注入卡拉哈里沙漠而形成，大部分水通过蒸发和蒸腾作…

locations.name: 波札那
locations.summary: 博茨瓦纳共和国（英語：Republic of Botswana；茨瓦納語：Lefatshe la Botswana），通稱博茨瓦纳（Botswana），是位於非洲南部的內陸國家，全國國境皆為乾燥的台地地形，卡拉哈里沙漠占据了该国大約70%…

relations.subject: Meyer's parrot
relations.evidence: They are found in high densities in the Okavango Delta region of Botswana

relations.subject: Meyer's parrot
relations.evidence: It is generally not considered to be at risk, as their large population, limited pressure from trade and hunting, and 6,000,000 km2 home range make these birds unlikely to face extinction in the near future
